title: Villavicencio, ME — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Villavicencio is a city in ME with a population of 500,000. The gateway to Colombia’s eastern plains, a hot and humid city known for its cowboy culture and livestock industry.
